description: Machine-readable boundary: internal governance truth is closed and single-sourced; external systems and humans consume only exported proofs, schemas, and committed evidence artifacts.

internal_truth.rule: No repository file other than STATUS.json may assert authoritative current repo status; other documents may summarize or link but must not contradict STATUS.json + inventory + committed evidence.

consumed_artifacts: GitHub Actions workflow logs and artifact names referenced from record.json
open_interfaces.rule: External automation and downstream repos must depend only on committed JSON/Markdown artifacts and documented schemas; they must not infer undocumented internal state.

non_override.rule: No external claim, dashboard, or out-of-band communication may override internal authoritative state recorded in STATUS.json and verified against HEAD, inventory, record, and ledger.

truth_boundary.reason: Epistemic closure inside the repo: current operational status is synthesized into STATUS.json from inventory ci_provenance, git HEAD, workflow identity, regression ledger tail, and remote evidence record; STATUS.md is a deterministic render. External parties receive only exported proofs and schema-valid artifacts listed under open_interfaces.
